creator: taoka@infonets.hiroshima-u.ac.jp
text:
Patch of this upgrade fixes many bugs.

Patch 'patch-for-mule-2.3' of end of this mail (file) must be applyed in
$PORTSDIR.

Note that please execute 'patch -pE < patch-for-mule-2.3', and the
following files or a directory will be deleted.

** Directory **
ports/japanese/mule-wnn

** Files **
ports/editors/mule/files/cannainfo.el
ports/editors/mule/files/dir
ports/editors/mule/files/md5
ports/editors/mule/patches/patch-aa
ports/editors/mule/patches/patch-ac
ports/editors/mule/scripts
ports/japanese/mule-canna/files/cannainfo.el
ports/japanese/mule-canna/files/dir
ports/japanese/mule-canna/files/md5
ports/japanese/mule-canna/patches/patch-aa
ports/japanese/mule-canna/patches/patch-ac
ports/japanese/mule-canna/patches/patch-ad
ports/japanese/mule-canna/patches/patch-ae
ports/japanese/mule-canna/pkg/PLIST
ports/japanese/mule-canna/scripts
ports/japanese/mule-sj3/files/cannainfo.el
ports/japanese/mule-sj3/files/dir
ports/japanese/mule-sj3/files/md5
ports/japanese/mule-sj3/patches/patch-aa
ports/japanese/mule-sj3/patches/patch-ac
ports/japanese/mule-sj3/patches/patch-ad
ports/japanese/mule-sj3/patches/patch-ae
ports/japanese/mule-sj3/pkg/PLIST
ports/japanese/mule-sj3/scripts
